_note: All active prompts used by the KYC engine. Every evaluation run must log the prompt ID and version. Changing a prompt requires creating a new version entry — never edit an existing one in production.

prompts.description: Structures raw OCR text into a KYC-schema JSON array for a target dataset type.
Classifies a file into one of the six KYC dataset types based on filename and content sample.
Analyzes a compliance document image (OCR text) and extracts structured fields with citations and risk flags.
